---
name: pull_request_template
description: help to create a pull request with template
argument-hint: Issue number, URL, or pasted issue details
disable-model-invocation: true
---

## Summary

Short description of the change and its purpose.

## Related Issue

Closes #<issue-number>

## Acceptance Criteria

This PR satisfies the following criteria defined in the issue:

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## Tasks

Implementation steps performed:

- [ ] Create feature branch
- [ ] Implement functionality
- [ ] Add tests (if applicable)
- [ ] Update documentation (if needed)

## Screenshots (if applicable)

## Notes

Additional context or technical decisions.
